Class Parameters

Desc

Defines the parameters that control the shape of a Lissajous curve.

Hierarchy

  • Parameters
  • Defined in parameters.ts:15
Index

constructor

Properties

amplitudeX amplitudeY animatePhaseShift frequencyX frequencyY phaseShift

Constructors

constructor

  • new Parameters(frequencyX?: number, frequencyY?: number, phaseShift?: number, amplitudeX?: number, amplitudeY?: number, animatePhaseShift?: boolean): Parameters

  • Desc

    Constructor for Parameters

    Parameters

    • frequencyX: number = 7

      Frequency of the X component (a)

    • frequencyY: number = 6

      Frequency of the Y component (b)

    • phaseShift: number = 1.73

      Phase difference φ in radians

    • amplitudeX: number = 100

      Amplitude of the X component in pixels (A)

    • amplitudeY: number = 100

      Amplitude of the Y component in pixels (B)

    • animatePhaseShift: boolean = true

      Whether φ should auto-increment over time

    Returns Parameters
